pi_items.verified_value: hl7-v2.5-oru-critical-r01.hl7 contains OBX|1 with OBX-8='HH' (Potassium 6.8, high critical) and OBX|3 with OBX-8='HH' (Creatinine 8.9, high critical)
hl7-v2.5-oru-normal-r01.hl7 contains all OBX segments with OBX-8='N' (normal) - all 5 OBX segments have normal flags

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a NextGen Connect integration channel named 'Lab Critical Value Router' listening on TCP port 6664 that routes HL7 ORU^R01 laboratory results to three destinations based on critical value severity: a 'critical_lab_results' PostgreSQL table for messages containing critical flags (OBX-8=HH or LL), a 'normal_lab_results' table for non-critical results, and an audit log directory at /tmp/lab_audit/ for all messages. The task is contextualized for a Health Informatics Specialist (SOC 15-1211.01), a recognized U.S. occupational classification. Sample test data includes both critical ORU messages with HH-flagged potassium and creatinine values, and normal ORU messages with all N-flagged observations.
